activation_condition: the complete patch-MIL oracle case study identifies matched-control excess or target/control mismatch in at least one failed pathology/operator cell

single_variable_change.to: deterministic exact-area connected candidate family selected by original-image intensity mean, standard deviation, gradient energy, and geometry
held_fixed: CheXlocalize validation pairs and expert masks

forbidden: hardest-control selection by model effect in this diagnostic
